summary: 1268 C# tests pass. String→enum regression from v3 fully resolved. Cast<T> now handles all conversion paths: exact type match, string→enum (case-insensitive via TryParse), int→enum (via ToObject), numeric widening (via ChangeType), with targeted exception catch and fallback. All findings from v1-v3 resolved. Approved — pass to auditor.
